codeSystems.name: CRAddressVS
codeSystems.title: CR - Address value set
codeSystems.description: Value set of address codes containing placeholder values that must be customised prior to implementation to reflect the administrative geography of the country or region.

codeSystems.name: CRAddressVS
codeSystems.title: CR - Address value set
codeSystems.description: Value set of address codes containing placeholder values that must be customised prior to implementation to reflect the administrative geography of the country or region.

codeSystems.name: CRBasisDiagnosisVS
codeSystems.title: CR - Basis diagnosis value set
codeSystems.description: Value set of basis of diagnosis codes aligned with the CanReg5 basis dictionary. Codes 0-4 are non-microscopically confirmed, codes 5-8 are microscopically confirmed, and code 9 is unknown.

codeSystems.name: CRBasisDiagnosisVS
codeSystems.title: CR - Basis diagnosis value set
codeSystems.description: Value set of basis of diagnosis codes aligned with the CanReg5 basis dictionary. Codes 0-4 are non-microscopically confirmed, codes 5-8 are microscopically confirmed, and code 9 is unknown.

codeSystems.name: CRBehaviourVS
codeSystems.title: CR - Behaviour value set
codeSystems.description: Value set of tumour behaviour codes aligned with the CanReg5 ICD-O-3.2 behaviour dictionary, used in the Tumor stage to classify the biological behaviour of the neoplasm.

codeSystems.name: CRBehaviourVS
codeSystems.title: CR - Behaviour value set
codeSystems.description: Value set of tumour behaviour codes aligned with the CanReg5 ICD-O-3.2 behaviour dictionary, used in the Tumor stage to classify the biological behaviour of the neoplasm.

codeSystems.name: CRGradeVS
codeSystems.title: CR - Grade value set
codeSystems.description: Value set of tumour grade and differentiation codes aligned with the CanReg5 ICD-O-3.2 grade dictionary. Includes histological grades 1-4, lymphoma/leukaemia-specific codes 5-8, and unknown (9). Grade is mandatory only when behaviour is malignant (3).

codeSystems.name: CRGradeVS
codeSystems.title: CR - Grade value set
codeSystems.description: Value set of tumour grade and differentiation codes aligned with the CanReg5 ICD-O-3.2 grade dictionary. Includes histological grades 1-4, lymphoma/leukaemia-specific codes 5-8, and unknown (9). Grade is mandatory only when behaviour is malignant (3).

codeSystems.name: CRMorphology4VS
codeSystems.title: CR - Morphology4 value set
codeSystems.description: Value set of ICD-O-3.2 morphology codes (first four digits) mapped from the CanReg5 morphology dictionary, representing histological types of neoplasms.

codeSystems.name: CRMorphology4VS
codeSystems.title: CR - Morphology4 value set
codeSystems.description: Value set of ICD-O-3.2 morphology codes (first four digits) mapped from the CanReg5 morphology dictionary, representing histological types of neoplasms.

codeSystems.name: CRMorphologyFamilyVS
codeSystems.title: CR - Morphology Family value set
codeSystems.description: Value set of morphological family grouping codes derived from the CanReg5 MorphFam.txt lookup file, used in the Sex-Morphology and Topography-Morphology data quality checks.

codeSystems.name: CRMorphologyFamilyVS
codeSystems.title: CR - Morphology Family value set
codeSystems.description: Value set of morphological family grouping codes derived from the CanReg5 MorphFam.txt lookup file, used in the Sex-Morphology and Topography-Morphology data quality checks.

codeSystems.name: CRMorphologyGroupVS
codeSystems.title: CR - Morphology Group value set
codeSystems.description: Value set of morphology group codes used in the Multiple Primary Tester data quality check, derived from the CanReg5 DefaultMultiplePrimaryTester mapping logic.

codeSystems.name: CRMorphologyGroupVS
codeSystems.title: CR - Morphology Group value set
codeSystems.description: Value set of morphology group codes used in the Multiple Primary Tester data quality check, derived from the CanReg5 DefaultMultiplePrimaryTester mapping logic.

codeSystems.name: CRMorphologyResultVS
codeSystems.title: CR - Morphology result value set
codeSystems.description: Value set of intermediate morphology evaluation result codes used in the Multiple Primary Tester check to determine whether to proceed to topography evaluation.

codeSystems.name: CRMorphologyResultVS
codeSystems.title: CR - Morphology result value set
codeSystems.description: Value set of intermediate morphology evaluation result codes used in the Multiple Primary Tester check to determine whether to proceed to topography evaluation.

codeSystems.name: CRMultiplePrimaryTestVS
codeSystems.title: CR - Multiple primary test value set
codeSystems.description: Value set of result codes for the Multiple Primary Tester data quality check, determining whether tumours are duplicate registrations, distinct multiple primaries, or have unknown topography.

codeSystems.name: CRMultiplePrimaryTestVS
codeSystems.title: CR - Multiple primary test value set
codeSystems.description: Value set of result codes for the Multiple Primary Tester data quality check, determining whether tumours are duplicate registrations, distinct multiple primaries, or have unknown topography.

codeSystems.name: CRPlaceholderSourceTypeVS
codeSystems.title: CR - Placeholder: Source type value set
codeSystems.description: Value set of placeholder source type codes for the Source stage. These values must be customised prior to implementation to reflect local source types (e.g. hospital records, pathology reports, death certificates).

codeSystems.name: CRPlaceholderSourceTypeVS
codeSystems.title: CR - Placeholder: Source type value set
codeSystems.description: Value set of placeholder source type codes for the Source stage. These values must be customised prior to implementation to reflect local source types (e.g. hospital records, pathology reports, death certificates).

codeSystems.name: CRSexVS
codeSystems.title: CR - Sex value set
codeSystems.description: Value set of sex codes aligned with the CanReg5 sex dictionary. These numeric codes are referenced in multiple data quality checks including Sex-Topography and Sex-Morphology checks.

codeSystems.name: CRSiteVS
codeSystems.title: CR - Site value set
codeSystems.description: Value set of anatomical site codes used to filter topography values in a dependent dropdown list for simplified data entry.

codeSystems.name: CRSiteVS
codeSystems.title: CR - Site value set
codeSystems.description: Value set of anatomical site codes used to filter topography values in a dependent dropdown list for simplified data entry.

codeSystems.name: CRTopographyGroupVS
codeSystems.title: CR - Topography Group value set
codeSystems.description: Value set of topography group codes used in the Multiple Primary Tester data quality check, derived from the CanReg5 DefaultMultiplePrimaryTester mapping logic.

codeSystems.name: CRTopographyGroupVS
codeSystems.title: CR - Topography Group value set
codeSystems.description: Value set of topography group codes used in the Multiple Primary Tester data quality check, derived from the CanReg5 DefaultMultiplePrimaryTester mapping logic.

codeSystems.name: CRTopographyMorphologyKeyVS
codeSystems.title: CR - Topography Morphology key value set
codeSystems.description: Value set of keys used in the Topography-Morphology data quality check. NA (*) means accepted with any topography; Plus (+) means checked against the MUST list; Minus (-) means checked against the MUST-NOT list.

codeSystems.name: CRTopographyMorphologyKeyVS
codeSystems.title: CR - Topography Morphology key value set
codeSystems.description: Value set of keys used in the Topography-Morphology data quality check. NA (*) means accepted with any topography; Plus (+) means checked against the MUST list; Minus (-) means checked against the MUST-NOT list.

codeSystems.name: CRTopographyVS
codeSystems.title: CR - Topography value set
codeSystems.description: Value set of ICD-O-3 topography codes mapped from the CanReg5 topography dictionary, representing anatomical sites of tumour origin.

codeSystems.name: CRTopographyVS
codeSystems.title: CR - Topography value set
codeSystems.description: Value set of ICD-O-3 topography codes mapped from the CanReg5 topography dictionary, representing anatomical sites of tumour origin.

codeSystems.name: CRTumorNumberVS
codeSystems.title: CR - Tumor number value set
codeSystems.description: Value set of tumor number identifiers. Combined with the Patient ID, the Tumor Number forms the Tumor ID composite identifier that uniquely identifies a tumor record within the system.

codeSystems.name: CRTumorNumberVS
codeSystems.title: CR - Tumor number value set
codeSystems.description: Value set of tumor number identifiers. Combined with the Patient ID, the Tumor Number forms the Tumor ID composite identifier that uniquely identifies a tumor record within the system.

codeSystems.name: CRTumorNumberVS
codeSystems.title: CR - Tumor number value set
codeSystems.description: Value set of tumor number identifiers. Combined with the Patient ID, the Tumor Number forms the Tumor ID composite identifier that uniquely identifies a tumor record within the system.

codeSystems.name: CRVitalStatusVS
codeSystems.title: CR - Vital status value set
codeSystems.description: Value set of vital status codes used in the Follow-up stage to record the current status of the registered patient.

codeSystems.name: CRVitalStatusVS
codeSystems.title: CR - Vital status value set
codeSystems.description: Value set of vital status codes used in the Follow-up stage to record the current status of the registered patient.

codeSystems.name: CREncounterTypeVS
codeSystems.title: Cancer Registry Encounter Types Value Set
codeSystems.description: Value set of encounter types for cancer registration stages.

codeSystems.name: CRObservationCodesVS
codeSystems.title: Cancer Registry Observation Codes Value Set
codeSystems.description: Value set containing all cancer-registry-specific observation type codes.
